title: CandidatePoolEntry
description: One persisted line in runs/<session_id>/candidate_pool.jsonl, written by search_session.log_candidates after the provenance gate passes. This is the durable contract the downstream discovery pipeline reads (fetch → extract → classify → save). The agent supplies url/title/company/etc.; the service fills candidate_id, url_hash, fetch_status and timestamp_captured.

url.description: Real job-posting URL confirmed via web_fetch (never a search-result or company-home page).

url_hash.description: Stable hash of the normalized url; used for in-session dedup.

source_query_id.description: query_id of the search_ledger entry this candidate came from.

relevance_reason.description: Why this posting matches the search profile.

workstream_hint.description: Legacy optional hint for role category (primary_workstream label guess); may be 'unknown'; refined by job report classifier.

fetch_status.description: Lifecycle of the JD fetch; written as 'pending' at admission.

timestamp_captured.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the candidate entered the pool.
